name: a technology in multiple umbrellas activates the union of all its umbrellas' namespaces
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" TypeScript 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'r=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(r["umbrellas"].length>=2 && r["activated_namespaces"].include?("oas") && r["activated_namespaces"].include?("web-vitals") ? 0:1)' && echo cross-family-union 1>&2
